test.query: SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 0
SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 1
SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 0
SELECT CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY CounterID ASC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 1

SELECT CounterID, EventDate, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 0

SELECT CounterID, EventDate, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 1

SELECT CounterID, EventDate, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate, RegionID ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 0

SELECT CounterID, EventDate, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY CounterID, EventDate, RegionID ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null SETTINGS optimize_aggregation_in_order = 1, optimize_aggregation_in_order_limit = 1
